title: calcitrapa alexandrina
intro: Calcitrapa alexandrina, also known as the Alexandrian Trap Plant, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Calcitrapa alexandrina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
